exp_title: Midgut polyA RNA of Apis mellifera Nurse (Colony 1)
design: Libraries were made with the NEBNext Illumina RNA-Seq library kit according to the manufacturer’s instructions. Sequencing was performed on the HiSeq 2000 (100 bp paired end).
sample_title: Midgut polyA RNA of Apis mellifera (Nurse)
sample_description: Midgut of the Nurse caste of Apis mellifera. Tissues were stored at -80C. RNA was extracted using Trizol protocl. Tissues homogenized in Trizol within 5 minutes of dissection.
center: UC Davis Department of Entomology and Nematology
